creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Maybe start with CC'ing kib & markj. I wonder if we shouldn't put some accounting of pipekva in uidinfo and offer some per-user limit for damage control, since you can easily drive up pipekva usage as an unprivileged user.

IIRC we don't necessarily kill the process that just allocated memory when we exhaust capacity, we make a somewhat intelligent choice about what to kill to try and reclaim memory. We'd need similar accounting here that I don't think really exists at the moment.
